name: Author's Sleep Stack
goal: Maximize sleep quality, duration, and hormonal recovery

steps.text: Take all other supplements DURING THE DAY — avoid risks of nighttime interference
5 hours before bedtime: take CBD oil (7 drops, 2%) if using
2 hours before bedtime: put on blue light blockers
30 min before sleep: take stack — Magnesium Citrate 500mg + L-Theanine 200–400mg + Valerian 500mg + Passion Flower 200–400mg + Lemon Balm 200–400mg + Apigenin 50mg
Lower screen brightness to 0; put on ASMR rain sound
Verify room temperature 15–20°C
Read for 15 min (paper book or lowest-brightness e-reader)
Turn off lights, insert earplugs, start ASMR, attempt sleep
On waking unsatisfied: perform NSDR — close eyes, let images play, do not force sleep

timing: Daily; supplements 30 min before sleep; CBD 5 hours before bedtime
cautions: Start with only Magnesium + L-Theanine + Apigenin if overwhelmed — add one supplement at a time.
Ashwagandha not recommended long-term — author discontinued due to emotional blunting.
Boron must be taken morning ONLY — causes premature waking if taken in evening.
Vitamin C at night caused sleep disruption for author — avoid.
Author is against melatonin supplementation.

name: Morning Light + Sunlight Protocol
goal: Anchor circadian rhythm; support testosterone, cortisol curve, sleep timing, dopamine

steps.text: Within 30–60 min of waking: get outside — not through glass or windows
Look at the sky (not directly at sun) for 30 seconds; 2–3 sets
Duration: clear day ~5 min; cloud cover ~10 min; dense overcast ~20–30 min
No sunglasses (corrective lenses OK); sunlight on face and upper body
If waking before sunrise: turn on all bright artificial lights indoors; go outside at sunrise
Avoid bright lights after 10pm, especially phone/screen light

timing: Every morning within 30–60 min of waking; avoid bright light 10pm–4am
cautions: Do NOT get sunlight through glass, windows, or windshields — photons are blocked.
Do not look directly at the sun.
Midday sunlight (20–40 min on maximal skin) is a separate protocol for vitamin D production.

name: Pre-Workout Nutrition (Protein-Only Pre + Intra Glucose)
goal: Maximize training partitioning — preserve lipolysis, avoid pre-workout insulin spike, route intra-glucose directly into working muscle fibers

steps.text: Maintain low-insulin state (fasted or protein-only) until training
0–60 min before training: 30–40g lean protein (whey isolate, egg whites, or lean meat/fish); fat ≤5–10g; low fiber; zero carbs
Prepare intra-workout drink: 30–50g dextrose or cyclic dextrin in water + 2g sodium
Begin training; after 1–2 heavy work sets (~15 min in): begin sipping intra drink slowly throughout session
Optional: warm shower 10 min + slow breathing post-training before eating
Within 30 min of last set: 100–200g starch + 30–40g lean protein; fat ≤5–7g; no fructose
2–3h later: animal protein + fat (beef, eggs); no carbs in this meal

cautions: Do NOT consume pre-workout carbohydrates — pre-carbs spike insulin, shut lipolysis, create energy mismatch.
Intra-glucose starts AFTER 1–2 hard sets, not at the start.
Post-workout meal fat must be ≤5–7g — high fat creates Randle competition.
No fructose post-workout — fructose goes to liver, not working muscle.
Pre-carbs are appropriate for endurance events >90 min only.

name: Post-Training Convergence Window
goal: Maximize muscle building and metabolic adaptation using the window when GLUT4, insulin sensitivity, AMPK, and mTOR all peak simultaneously

steps.text: After last set: do NOT immediately eat
Warm shower ~10 min + slow/deep breathing with extended exhales — activate parasympathetic
Eat 100–200g starch (hot white rice or freshly peeled hot potatoes) + 30–40g lean protein; fat <5–7g; no fructose
With first bites: R-ALA 300mg + HMB 1g + Taurine 2g + joint stack (MSM 2g + Glucosamine 2g + Chondroitin 1g)
Optional: 10-min slow walk after meal
2–3h later: animal protein + fats (beef, eggs, tallow) — no carbs (GLUT4 tail has faded)

timing: Immediately post-training; complete within 30 min of last set
cautions: Warm shower + breathing before eating — eating in sympathetic state impairs absorption.
Post-workout meal fat must be <5–7g.
Avoid cooled/chilled starch (retrogradation creates resistant starch — slower absorption).
No fructose. No fruit. No honey in this window.
Second meal (2–3h later): protein + fat only — no carbs once GLUT4 window has closed.

name: Carb Cycling Protocol
goal: Route more carbs to training days when GLUT4 is open; reduce on rest days when it is closed — same weekly total, better results

steps.text: Pick weekly carb baseline (e.g. body weight kg × 3 g/kg = daily average)
Calculate 25% of daily carbs = transfer amount
Rest days: reduce carbs by the transfer amount
Training days: increase carbs by the transfer amount
Route extra training-day carbs into intra-workout and first post-workout meal
Second post-workout meal: protein + fat only — no carbs (GLUT4 tail faded)
Rest days: keep protein and fat the same; reduce carbs only

cautions: Do not reduce total calories on rest days — only redistribute carbs.
If multiple consecutive rest days, repeat transfer for each one.
Protein must remain ≥1.6–2.2 g/kg every day regardless of training day.

name: Microneedling for Hair
goal: Trigger wound healing response — collagen, angiogenesis, growth factors; increase topical absorption 10–100×

steps.text: Cleanse scalp thoroughly before treatment
Use derma stamp or derma pen (NOT roller — rollers tear; stamps puncture cleanly)
Needle depth: 0.5–1.0mm for scalp
Stamp affected areas: 3–5 passes per section at different angles until mild erythema
Immediately apply treatment oils/serums (absorption 10–100× higher post-needling)
Do not touch scalp for 6–12 hours post-treatment

cautions: Derma STAMP or PEN only — NOT roller.
Apply oils immediately while channels are open.
Avoid touching scalp for 6–12 hours post-treatment.
Visible improvements typically take 3–6 months.

name: Hair Oil Blend Protocol (Tallow + Carrier Oils)
goal: Nourish scalp, stimulate circulation, deliver fat-soluble vitamins transdermally, promote anagen phase

steps.text: BEEF TALLOW (1–2×/week): Melt grass-fed tallow slightly. Apply to scalp, massage 5–10 min. Leave 2–6h or overnight. Wash with egg or clay.
CARRIER BLEND (2–3×/week): Mix 40% castor + 30% coconut + 20% olive/avocado + 10% jojoba in dark glass bottle
Add essential oils: 120 drops rosemary EO + optional 30 drops peppermint + 30 drops lavender + 20 drops cedarwood
Apply to scalp (post-microneedling if same day), massage 5–10 min
Leave minimum 2 hours; overnight ideal
Wash with egg wash or bentonite clay

cautions: Use 100% pure essential oils — not fragrance oils.
Store blend in dark glass bottle.
Rosemary oil (1%) outperformed minoxidil (2%) with zero side effects in comparative study.
Excess oil can clog pores in some individuals.

name: Raw Egg Hair Washing
goal: Cleanse and condition scalp with biotin, B-vitamins, amino acids; eliminate inflammatory stress from conventional shampoo

steps.text: Crack 2–4 raw eggs (pasture-raised preferred)
Apply to wet hair; massage into scalp 2–3 min
Leave on 10–15 min
Rinse thoroughly with COOL water — hot water cooks egg and creates residue
Optional: add 1 tsp raw honey before applying (antimicrobial)

cautions: COOL water only — hot water denatures egg proteins.
Transition period: expect 2–4 weeks of greasiness when switching from shampoo — normal.

name: Testosterone Optimization Starter Diet (Androgen Base Diet)
goal: Build the dietary foundation for testosterone, DHT, and overall hormonal health

steps.text: Get body fat to 10–20% range (target 0.5–1 lb/week; rapid loss can lower testosterone)
Build base: 80% of intake from animal foods + simple starch
Protein: ~2 g/kg BW (sources: red meat, eggs, shellfish, clean dairy)
Fat: 1.2–1.8 g/kg (sources: beef/lamb fat, egg yolks, butter, ghee, tallow; zero seed oils)
Carbs: 2–4 g/kg (sources: potatoes, white rice, properly prepared oats)
Micronutrients: red meat, organs (2–3×/week), eggs (3–10/day), shellfish, clean dairy
Eliminate: liquid sugar, pastries, candy, all seed oils, soy products, random supermarket dairy
Meat prep: soak in water + baking soda (5g/bowl) 1–3h; cook in own fat in oven; rare to medium-rare
Oats: soak, discard water, ferment ~24h in raw A2 kefir/yogurt before consuming

cautions: Do NOT drop carbs to zero while training hard — causes high cortisol + low T3 + T suppression.
Rapid weight loss (>1 lb/week) can reduce testosterone.
Transition: 8–12 weeks to fully merge with base diet.
Oats REQUIRE preparation (soak + ferment) — not approved plain.
RANKED #1 PROTOCOL — every other protocol depends on this foundation being in place.

name: DHT Optimization Starter Stack
goal: Increase DHT and free androgen activity through foundational supplements, introduced one lever at a time

steps.text: PREREQUISITE: nutrition baseline (post-training starch + protein), sleep 7.5–9h fixed, consistent training — must be in place first
Week 1: Creatine 10–15g/day split across meals
Week 2: Kestose — start 1g once daily; build to 2–3g twice daily; target 5g twice daily by Week 3–4
Week 3: Boron 3–6mg each morning with food
Week 4 (optional): Topical DHEA 5–10mg to scrotal skin once daily — ONLY if not prone to aromatization

timing: Staged weekly introduction; re-evaluate at week 8
cautions: Prerequisites (nutrition, sleep, training) must be in place before starting.
One new lever per week — essential for attribution.
Water retention, soft look, nipple sensitivity, mood swings → drop DHEA first.
GI gas/loose stool → cut kestose to 2–3g twice/day for 1 week.
Kestose must be 1-kestose ≥90% — NOT generic FOS.
Boron morning ONLY.
DHEA topical: raise to 10–20mg only after 2 weeks with zero estrogen signs.

name: Blood Work Monitoring Protocol
goal: Establish baseline, identify root causes, fix upstream, confirm results with re-testing

steps.text: PHASE 1 — BASELINE: Test full comprehensive panel
PHASE 1: Identify markers clearly off vs optimal ranges
PHASE 1: Fix obvious lifestyle inputs (calories, carbs, sleep, gut, seed oils, alcohol)
PHASE 2 (4–8 weeks later): Re-test only markers that were off; compare before vs after
PHASE 2: If markers moved → continue. If nothing budged → go to Phase 3.
PHASE 3: Intracellular micronutrient testing (Vibrant America or SpectraCell)
PHASE 3: Organic acids / mitochondrial testing (OAT/ION panel)
PHASE 3: Gut testing (Gut Zoomer, GI360, GI Effects, Biomesight)
PHASE 3: Genetics (Mitome, Dante Labs) if persistent walls
PHASE 3: Toxin panels only when symptom picture fits

timing: Phase 1: at baseline. Phase 2: 4–8 weeks after changes. Phase 3: only after Phase 2 fails.
items_needed: LH, FSH, Total T, SHBG, Free T, DHEA-S, E2, Prolactin, DHT, IGF-1, Morning Cortisol, TSH, Free T4, Free T3, rT3, TPO/Tg antibodies, Fasting glucose, Fasting insulin, HbA1c, hsCRP, Full lipids, Iron panel, Micronutrients, Vitamin D, Liver enzymes, Kidney markers, CBC with differential
cautions: Do NOT test ALT/AST within 5–7 days of heavy lifting — false elevation from muscle damage.
Do NOT test hsCRP if currently ill or within 1–2 days of very hard training.
Test fasting (10–12h) for glucose, insulin, lipids.
Never treat one number — always read patterns across related markers.
If money is tight: split panel into 2–3 blocks over a few months.

name: Hair Loss Phased Implementation Protocol
goal: Systematically restore metabolic conditions for healthy hair growth; address root causes in order of impact

steps.text: PHASE 1 (Weeks 1–4): Fix sleep 7–9h consistent schedule
PHASE 1: Install shower filter (KDF + activated carbon + vitamin C cartridge)
PHASE 1: Daily sunlight 20–40 min midday, 4–6 days/week
PHASE 1: Begin egg washing 1–2×/week (no-shampoo transition)
PHASE 1: Fix diet — animal proteins, no seed oils, no processed sugar
PHASE 2 (Weeks 5–8): Microneedling 1× every 7–14 days
PHASE 2: Hair oiling 2–3×/week, especially post-microneedling
PHASE 2: Bentonite clay masks 1–2×/week
PHASE 2: Collagen 10–20g/day with 1g Vitamin C
PHASE 2: Red light therapy 3–4×/week, 10–15 min/session (660nm + 850nm, 6–12 inches)
PHASE 3 (Weeks 9–12+): Experiment with oil blends; dial in frequency; add wooden comb + silk pillowcase; retest labs

cautions: Phase 1 is the foundation — do not skip to topicals without fixing sleep, diet, water quality first.
Expected visible signs by week 12; full follicle cycle is 2–7 years.
AVOID keto/very low-carb — raises cortisol chronically, directly causes hair loss.
Shower filter: replace every 3–6 months.
'Most people quit right before results appear.'

name: Stress Management Protocol
goal: Reduce cortisol; protect testosterone synthesis from stress-induced suppression

steps.text: Acute tool — double breath: inhale to ~90% → pause → quick inhale to ~110% → full exhale → repeat
Morning: no phone for first few hours; turn off notifications
Daily: walk outside 30–60 min (nature/parks preferred)
Daily: supplement magnesium (lowers cortisol under prolonged stress)
When acutely stressed: L-theanine or Ashwagandha short-term only (cycles)
End of day: something relaxing — reading, social time, movie
When carrying cognitive/emotional load: stress journal (date, situation, emotions, physical symptoms, coping, reflection)
Optional: mood journal — score 1–10 every 2 hours for 1 week once per month; identify low-point patterns

timing: Daily; journaling when needed; acute technique in the moment
cautions: Ashwagandha: short-term only — author discontinued due to emotional blunting.
'Managing stress is non-negotiable: no topical treatment or supplement can overcome chronic stress.'
Magnesium depleted quickly by chronic stress — not optional.

name: Gut Reset Protocol
goal: Fix gut function to unblock testosterone production, nutrient absorption, and hormonal delivery

steps.text: Remove all problematic inputs: raw vegetables, cruciferous, garlic/onion/leeks/asparagus, high-fiber foods, seed oils, fructose
Fix water timing: no fluids 20–30 min before meals; minimal sipping during meals; wait 30 min after to drink normally
Elimination diet 2–3 days: red meat + potatoes or white rice only; observe bloating, stool, reflux, skin, mood
Add one food at a time, 2–3 days each; if symptoms → remove permanently
Document everything: what you ate + symptoms 3–12h later
Add gut repair supplements after elimination baseline established

timing: 2–3 days for initial elimination; ongoing gradual reintroduction
cautions: 'If your gut is leaking, inflamed, or slow, nothing else in this book lands properly.'
L. reuteri must be strains 6475 + 17938 specifically.
Ramp kestose slowly to avoid GI gas.
Betaine HCl + pepsin: only when protein digestion is poor.
Ox bile: only when fat digestion is impaired.

name: DHT Boosting Nutrition Plan
goal: Structure all meals to maximize DHT production and GLUT4-driven partitioning

steps.text: PRE-TRAINING: Whey isolate 25–40g + pinch salt; OR egg whites 300ml; OR lean meat 150–200g. No fats, no fiber.
INTRA (after 1–2 hard sets): Glucose 30–50g + sodium 2g
POST (0–30 min): Lean protein 30–40g + starch 100–200g; fat ≤5–7g; no fructose
LATER MEAL: 85–90% beef or lamb, or 10–20 whole eggs; animal fat only; no seed oils
WEEKLY ANCHORS: Liver 50–100g 2–3×/week; Oysters every other day; Eggs 3–6/day; Selenium 100–200mcg

cautions: Very low fat in first post-training meal — ensures insulin signal lands cleanly for DHT conversion.
Fats return in later meal for steroidogenesis.
No seed oils. No fructose.

name: Starter 5-Alpha Stack (Advanced)
goal: Basic DHT/5AR support with stepwise additions — starting point for advanced DHT library

steps.text: BASELINE: Creatine 5–10g/day + post-training carbs 50–100g + sodium 2g during training + sleep 7.5–9h fixed
Week 1: Creatine 10–15g/day split
Week 2: Kestose ramp (Days 1–3: 1g once; Days 4–6: 1g twice; Days 7–9: 2g twice; Days 10–14: 3g twice; Week 3+: 5g twice)
Week 3: Boron 3–6mg each morning
Week 4 (optional): DHEA topical 5–10mg scrotal skin; raise to 10–20mg only after 2 weeks with no estrogen signs

cautions: ADVANCED PROTOCOL — not MVP daily checklist.
STOP: Water retention/soft look/nipple sensitivity/mood swings → drop DHEA first.
STOP: GI gas/loose stool → cut kestose to 2–3g twice/day for 1 week.
STOP: Headache/BP creep → check sodium/hydration, review boron.
TRACK: Morning wood 3 days/week; resting heart rate; waist weekly.
LABS week 8: DHT, SHBG, Free T, estradiol.
Safety rule: if BP climbs, edema, sleep tanks, nipples sensitive → pull newest lever first.

name: Ultimate DHT Stack (Advanced)
goal: Aggressive advanced DHT optimization for users stable on Protocol 16 basics

steps.text: PREREQUISITE: Stable on Protocol 16 basics

Add one per week: Creatine 10–20g → Kestose 5g 2× → Boron 6–10mg → Lespedeza 3–5g → L. reuteri 6475 → DHEA topical 10–20mg (if not aromatizing) → Dioscorea (if skipping DHEA) → Methylene blue 2–10mg (last)
Run 6–8 weeks on, 2 weeks easy

cautions: ADVANCED PROTOCOL — hide behind advanced mode in app UI.
STOP: Insomnia/wired → cut methylene blue; still wired → reduce boron.
STOP: BP up/edema → remove DHEA first; reduce Lespedeza.
STOP: Acne/scalp oil/shedding → lower/hold DHEA; add apigenin.
Methylene blue: pharma/lab grade only; avoid serotonergic meds and G6PD deficiency; morning/midday ONLY.
Lespedeza: standardized extract, total flavonoids ≥20%.
Dioscorea: diosgenin 10–20% or pure diosgenin ≥90%; skip if using DHEA.

name: Low Testosterone + 5-Alpha Stack (Advanced)
goal: Push LH/testicular output first, then improve conversion and androgen availability

steps.text: Week 1: Tongkat Ali 200–400mg each morning
Week 2: Creatine 10–20g/day
Week 3: Boron 6–10mg AM
Week 4: Kestose 5g 2×/day (ramp as Protocol 16)
Week 5: Optional second herb — choose ONE: Fadogia 300–600mg AM | Akarkara 300–600mg | Bryonia 300–600mg
Week 6: Lespedeza cuneata 3–5g/day
Week 7: DHEA topical 10–20mg only if zero estrogen signs; run 8 weeks then 2 easy

timing: Stepwise over 7 weeks; 8 weeks total then 2 easy
cautions: ADVANCED — context-triggered only for low T profile/labs.
STOP: Nipple sensitivity/water/soft look/mood swings → remove DHEA first.
STOP: BP up/edema → reduce Lespedeza.
STOP: Insomnia/agitation/testicular discomfort on second herb → stop second herb immediately.
LABS weeks 6–8: Total T, Free T, LH, FSH, DHT, SHBG, estradiol.

name: High Aromatase + 5-Alpha Stack (Advanced)
goal: Trim aromatase activity and keep 5-alpha conversion active when E2 runs high

steps.text: Day 1: Damiana 500–1,000mg/day + Apigenin 50–150mg at night + Boron 6mg AM + Creatine 10–20g/day
Day 4: Add Tribulus 500–1,500mg/day (protodioscin ≥20%)
Day 7: Add Lespedeza cuneata ≥20% flavonoids 1,250mg/day or raw herb 3–5g/day
Per kestose ramp: 2–3g 2×/day × 7 days, then 5g 2×/day
Run 6–8 weeks, then 2 easy weeks; hold herbs during easy, keep creatine/boron

cautions: ADVANCED — requires E2/aromatase context; not for generic use.
STOP: Joints ache/libido flat/mood low → likely E2 too low; halve damiana or drop apigenin to 50mg.
STOP: Nipple sensitivity/water → raise apigenin within range.
TRACK: Estradiol sensitive at weeks 3–4 and 6–8.

name: Anti-Anxiety 5-Alpha Stack (Advanced)
goal: Calm sympathetic tone while supporting 5-alpha/neurosteroid output — wired/stressed profile

steps.text: Day 1: Creatine 10–15g + Boron 6–10mg AM + PEA 600mg 2×/day (max 1,200mg) + Glycine 1–3g at night
Day 4: Lespedeza cuneata ≥20% flavonoids 1,250mg/day
Day 7: Kestose ramp (2–3g 2× → 5g 2×)
Optional: Gelsemium 1 cap at night, OR L-theanine 200–300mg PM
Optional: DHEA topical 5–10mg only if anxiety stable and no estrogen signs; run 6–8 weeks

cautions: ADVANCED — for wired/stressed user profile.
STOP: Groggy/depressed/flat → drop glycine to 1g; remove Gelsemium first.
STOP: Irritability/insomnia/BP up → lower PEA.
STOP: Nipple sensitivity → remove DHEA first.
TRACK: Nightly anxiety score 0–10; aim for -2 to -3 points by week 6–8.

name: Libido 5-Alpha Stack (Advanced)
goal: Libido and erection support through androgen availability, conversion, and gut 5AR

steps.text: Day 1: Tongkat Ali 200–400mg AM + Tribulus 500–1,500mg/day (protodioscin ≥20%) + Creatine 10–20g/day + Boron 6–10mg AM
Day 3: L. reuteri 6475 1–2 caps/day if using
Day 7: Kestose ramp
Optional: Apigenin 50–150mg at night; run 6–8 weeks, 2 easy weeks

cautions: ADVANCED — not default MVP.
STOP: Irritability/insomnia → reduce tongkat to 200mg.
STOP: Nipple sensitivity → hold boron at 6mg.
LABS weeks 6–8: DHT, SHBG, Total T, Free T, estradiol sensitive.

name: Scalp-Sparing 5-Alpha Lane (Advanced)
goal: Maintain androgenic strength and libido while protecting hairline — without systemic 5-alpha blockade

steps.text: Core: Tongkat Ali 200–400mg AM + Creatine 10–15g/day + Kestose 5g 2× + Boron 6–10mg AM + Apigenin 50–150mg night
Optional: DHEA topical 5–10mg only if not aromatizing
SCALP KIT: Ketoconazole shampoo 2% 2–4×/week (3–5 min contact time)
SCALP KIT: Caffeine scalp tonic 1% daily on off-ketoconazole days
SCALP KIT: Rosemary oil 1–2% in carrier — daily massage to thinning zones
SCALP KIT: Microneedling 0.6–1.0mm once weekly; optional topical melatonin 0.1–0.3% nightly

timing: 6–8 weeks on, 2 weeks easy; scalp defense ongoing
cautions: ADVANCED — combines DHT + Hair modules.
STOP: Scalp burning/flaking → dilute rosemary or pause 7 days.
STOP: Shedding >30% for 3 weeks → increase ketoconazole; drop tongkat to 200mg.
STOP: Nipple sensitivity → remove DHEA first.
TRACK: Wash-day shed count weekly; standardized photos monthly.

name: Neuro Framework Stack (Advanced)
goal: Upregulate neurosteroids and growth signals so existing DHT has greater tissue impact; calmer NS, deeper sleep, faster repair

steps.text: L-Theanine 200–400mg evening, 60–90 min before bed
Sodium butyrate 500–1,000mg with meals OR tributyrin 1,000mg with biggest meal
Apigenin 50–150mg at night
PEA ultramicronized 600mg twice/day with meals (max 1,200mg/day)
Pregnenolone 5mg morning; step by 5mg weekly ONLY if mood stays calm and focus improves; max 15mg

cautions: ADVANCED — not MVP.
STOP: Wired/irritable/acne/insomnia → remove pregnenolone first.
STOP: Daytime sedation → cut apigenin to 50mg.
STOP: Head pressure/GI upset → halve sodium butyrate.
STOP: Anxiety up/sleep lighter → reduce/stop PEA.
STOP: Nipple sensitivity/soft watery look → stop pregnenolone immediately.
Pregnenolone must be stepped up slowly — 5mg weekly increments.

name: Sleep and Shift-Worker 5-Alpha Rescue (Advanced)
goal: Protect sleep, thyroid tone, IGF-1, and 5-alpha signaling under shift work or severely disrupted sleep

steps.text: Glycine 3g + Magnesium glycinate 200–400mg + Apigenin 50–150mg — all 60–90 min before sleep
Melatonin 0.3–1mg 60–90 min before sleep (smallest dose that works)
Phosphatidylserine 200–300mg 30–60 min before sleep — ONLY if wired at bedtime
Vitamin D3 2,000–5,000 IU + K2 MK-7 100–200mcg with first meal after waking
Creatine 10–15g/day + Boron 6–10mg AM + Kestose 5g 2×/day
LIGHT: Wake → 10,000 lux 20–30 min or full sun. Night shift → bright/cool workspace. Commute home → dark glasses. Bedroom → blackout, 17–19°C, eye mask, white noise.
TRAINING: After longest sleep block; 45–75 min; post-training 50–100g carbs + 30–40g protein, fat ≤5–7g

timing: Context-dependent — shift work / disrupted sleep / wired bedtime only
cautions: ADVANCED CONTEXT-DEPENDENT — do not show unless user selects shift work / disrupted sleep profile.
STOP: Groggy/vivid dreams → cut melatonin to 0.3–0.5mg or drop.
STOP: Daytime lethargy → reduce apigenin to 50mg.
STOP: Wired bedtime → increase phosphatidylserine by 100mg.
Note: melatonin is not recommended generally (Protocol 1) — this is a specific exception for severe circadian disruption.
Use smallest melatonin dose possible — start at 0.3mg.
